professionalSummary.intro: Senior software engineer and engineering leader with 15+ years building production web applications, leading cross-functional teams, and architecting scalable frontend systems. Currently Engineering Manager at Carousell, managing 6 engineers across web, mobile, and backend platforms with focus on TypeScript, Next.js, and e-commerce infrastructure.
keyStrengths: Led frontend engineering and mentored developers at Carousell's OxStreet marketplace using Next.js and TypeScript
Architected frontend systems for SoBanHang's e-commerce platform, enabling rapid growth in Vietnam's market
Built shared infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines across multiple projects; experience with monorepo architectures
Managed cross-functional engineering teams delivering platform features for marketplaces serving millions of users
Strong backend skills in Node.js, Golang, GraphQL, and event-driven microservices alongside frontend expertise
